name: ComputeBoardHal
description: Mini hardware abstraction layer for the custom ESP32-WROOM-32E compute-board: secondary VCC_AUX rail control, config-button probe, and an ultra-low-power deep-sleep routine that latches all peripheral I/O into Hi-Z and holds the rail LOW through sleep.
keywords: esp32, low-power, deep-sleep, hal, compute-board, gpio-hold, vcc-aux
